report.title: LAPOLU
report.body: Malu mabi adi mua kudileja mu mishindu ya bungi mu nsombelu wetu. Tudi tukupesha mushindu wa kumanyisha mishindu yonso ya malu mabi.

appointment.title:
DIFUNDA
DIA KUTUADIKANGANA
appointment.body: Bua kulongolola tshisangilu ne tshipangu tshia ditunga, udi mua kuwuja mukanda wa dilomba dia mudimu udi ulonda eu. Ikala mujadike ne: miaba yonso idibu balomba idi miuja bimpe bua tuetu kumona mua kuenza mudimu bimpe ne dilomba diebe. Neupete mukanda wa dianyisha anyi dibikila dia ku telefone ne dituku ne dîba bidibu balongolole.

appeal.title:
KULOMBA KUDI
TSHIPANGU
TSHIA DITUNGA
appeal.body1: Dilomba dia dilumbuluisha kudi tshipangu tshia ditunga ndilongolola dia malu a mbulamatadi didi dianyishila tshitupa kampanda bua kuela mapangadika ne bienzedi bia mbulamatadi mpata. Tshipangu tshia ditunga tshidi tshijadika ni mikenji ya mbulamatadi ivua mitumikila bimpa ne ni mikenji mikumbane ivua milonda.
appeal.body2: Tshipangu tshia ditunga tshidi tshikuata kudi dilomba dia bena ditunga anyi kudi dimanyisha difila kudi Tshipangu. Dilomba dia dilumbuluisha didi ne tshia kufidibua mu tshikondo tshidi mikenji misungula ne didi ne tshia kujadikibua kudi mukanda wa dilomba udi ne mikanda idi ijadika.

appealSteps.title: MUSHINDU WA KUFILA DILOMBA DIA DILUMBULUISHA
appealSteps.subtitle: Landila bidimu ebi bua kutuma dilomba diebe kudi Tshipangu tshia Ditunga

1.title: Longolola mikanda yebe
1.body: Sangisha dipangadika dia mbulamatadi didi ulomba, mukanda wa kujidika bu muntu ne bintu bionso bidi bitshimikina dipanga diebe. Jadika ne mikanda yonso idi mua kubaleka bimpe ne idi ijadikiwe paudi ubikenga.

2.title: Funda mukanda wa dilomba
2.body: Funda mukanda uleja ne bukese malu enzeke, mbitu bidi bikukokesha bua kulomba, ne tshiudi ulomba bua kuangata. Bika biajiki bia mikenji idikala isaluka.

3.title: Fidila ku Greffe
3.body: Fidila mukanda webe wa dilomba ne mikanda ya bujadiki ku Greffe wa Tshipangu tshia Ditunga mu tshikondo tshidi mikenji isungula. Angata bulongolodi bua kujadika ne udi mumane kufila.

4.title: Futa mali a mikenji
4.body: Futa mali a kabadi adibu balomba mu biro bidi bishunguludiwe. Bika mukanda wa bujadiki bua difuta bua kukonga bintu biebe.

5.title: Linda dimanyisha
5.body: Greffe neakumanyishe numero ya dossier ne dituku dia dipetangana. Mbimpe bua badikukeba kufidila ne bakwabo batupa mikanda ya dosie.

haveQuestions.title: Udi ne nkonko?
haveQuestions.body: Tshisumbu tshietu tshidi apa bua kukwambulwila bua kuumvua mushindu wa dilomba dia dilumbuluisha.

1.question: Tshikondo kai tshia kufila dilomba dia dilumbuluisha?
1.answer: Bikaleku pa tshibidi, dilomba didi ne bua kufidibua mu ngondo ibidi panyima pa dimanyisha dia dipangadika didi bakudila. Mikenji mikwabo idi mua kusungula bikondo bishesha bilondeshile mushindu wa benza dia mbulamatadi. Tangila mikenji idikala isaluka anyi ubikile Greffe bua dimvuluwu.

2.question: Ndi mua kudifila nkamue anyi ndi ne bua kuangata avocat?
2.answer: Udi mua kudifila kudi Tshipangu tshia Ditunga nkamue. Kadi, kudi malu makole, kusungila avocat nkunengelela. Greffe udi mua kukufila dimvuluwu pa bualu bua musadidi wa mikenji buudi mua kuupeta.

3.question: Mikanda kayi idingile kufila?
3.answer: Pabuipi udi ne bua kufila: dipangadika didi ulomba, mukanda webe wa dilomba, mukanda wa kujidika bu muntu ne mikanda ya bujadiki. Greffe udi ufila liste ya bintu bidi bikengelaku padibu bamulomba. Mikanda mikwabo idi mua kulombibua bilondeshile dossier webe.

4.question: Mushindu eu udi uangata tshikondo tshinganyi?
4.answer: Tshikondo tshia didibikila tshiidi tshishintuluka bilondeshile bukole bua dossier ne bungi bua mudimu wa kabadi. Neupete dituku dia dipetangana panyima pa dossier webe kumanaku ku rejistre. Greffe udi mua kukufila bikondo bidi bipepele pa dossiers bidi bifanane.

5.question: Ndi mua kukeba kufumishe dilomba diami anyi?
5.answer: Eyo. Udi mua kufumisha dilomba diebe mu dîba dionso kumpala kua dipangadika dia ndekeelu. Fila mukanda wa kufumisha mu ditumba ku Greffe. Anji umanye ne kufumisha didi mua kukwata pa malanda makwabo adi ne dossier eu.

0.subtitle: PALAIS DU PEUPLE - 13 NOVEMBRE 2025
0.body: Tshipangu tshia ditunga tshiakadisangisha ku nzubu wa bukalenge wa bantu bua diunzulula dia tshidimu tshia kulumbuluisha tshia 2025-2026.

1.title: TSHIDIMU TSHIA BULUMBULU BUA BUALU BUA BUALU BUA 2025 - 2026
1.subtitle: Nzubu wa mikenji ne bulongame
1.body: Tshinjinjimbi etshi tshidi tshileja diunzulula dia tshidimu tshia kulumbuluisha tshia 2025-2026. Mu dikalaku dia mfumu wa ditunga Felix Tshisekedi, tshisangilu etshi tshivua tshisangisha banzuji banene ne bena malu a mikenji.
1.cta: Tangila malu adi enzeka pa YouTube

2.title: KUKOKESHA BUA BUALU BUA BUALU BUA BUALU NE BUALU BUA BUALU
2.subtitle: Nzubu wa mikenji ne bulongame
2.body: Tshipangu tshia ditunga tshidi tshitungunuka ne kulama mikenji ya bululame, ya bululame, ne ya mikenji. Tudi badisuike bua kujadika patoke ne bululame.
2.cta: Manya malu makuabu adi atangila mudimu wetu

3.title: KUTUADILA BUALU BUIMPE BIA MIKANDA MU REPUBLIQUE DEMOCRATIQUE DU CONGO
3.subtitle: Nzubu wa mikenji ne bulongame
3.body: Ku diambuluisha dia dilongesha dikole dia mikenji ne dilonda dia mikenji mimpe ya pa buloba bujima, tudi tudienzeja bua kulama mikenji mitambe buimpe ya malu a kulumbuluisha.

news.title: MAPIA MAPIA
news.body: Ikala mumanye mapangadika manene ne malu adi enzeka.

excerpts.title: BITUPA BIA MU MIDIMU
excerpts.body: Tangila mêba a dilumbuluisha ne bilumbu bidi kabiyi bijika.

report.title: LAPOLU
report.body: Umanyishe malu adi kaayi malelela anyi adi kaayi malelela mu bukubi.

appointment.title: KUFUNDA MUKANDA
appointment.body: Teka programe wa diyukidilangana ne bena mudimu ba ku kabadi.

keyFacts.title: Malu manene
keyFacts.subtitle: Bungi bua tshilumbu, dîba dia kuenza mudimu, ne mapangadika adibu basangisha anu musangu umue.

processing.title: Dîba dia kuenza mudimu
processing.aria: Tshikondo tshia mudimu tshia munkatshi mu tshitupa tshisatu

offer.title: BITUDI TUFILA
offer.subtitle: Tudi tufila mishindu milongolola ya mikenji bua kukumbaja majinga ebe, bua kujadika ne: makokeshi ebe adi makubibue ne buakane buenzeke.

1.title: Bukokeshi bua kulumbuluisha bunene
1.body: Bu mudi kabadi kanene ka ndongoluelu wa malu a kulumbuluisha, Tshipangu tshia Ditunga tshidi tshijadika diunvuija dia mikenji ne ditumikila dia mikenji mu Ditunga dijima dia Kongu wa Ditunga.

2.title: Bujadiki bua mikenji
2.body: Ku diambuluisha dia mikenji yetu ne mapangadika etu, tudi tuteka bilejilu bia mikenji bidi bilombola tubadi tukese ne tujadika dikala dia bululame mu dienza dia malu makane.

3.title: Buimpe bua malu a kulumbuluisha
3.body: Bakulumpe betu ne bafidi betu ba mibelu badi basungula bilondeshile bipedi, bua kujadika mikenji mipite bungi ya dimanya dia mikenji, bululame, ne didifila ku bululame.

4.title: Buobumue bua matunga masanga
4.body: Tudi tuenza mudimu ne tshisumi mu diyukidilangana ne bibambalu bia kulumbuluisha bia matunga masanga ne tulama malanda ne tubadi tudi tuakula muakulu wa Mfualansa ne tubadi tua mu Afrike.

expertise.title: BIDIMU BIDI BIMANYISHA
expertise.subtitle: STATE COUNCIL udi ne bukookeshi pa malu mashilangane a mikenji bu kabadi kanene ka bulongolodi bua dilumbuluisha dia patupu.

address.title: Adelese wa biro
address.body: 7639, intersection of Pumbu and Batonniers Avenues in the commune of Gombe/Kinshasa-RDC

1.title: MULOMBODI WA KUMPALA WA TSHIBUMBA WA DITUKU

paragraphs.1: Bu mudiye muntu muisatu mu tshipangu tshinene tshia malu a kulumbuluisha tshia ditunga dia RDC, mulombodi wa kumpala wa tshipangu tshia ditunga, Brigitte Nsensele Wa Nsensele, wakafila mashi mu dia matuku 27 ngondo muibidi, bua kuleja muvuabu bafue mu mvita ya bena Rwanda ku est kua ditunga.
paragraphs.2: Bua muena Congo yonso udi ne demokrasi, kufila diambuluisha mu mvita mmudimu wa bena ditunga. Tshibambalu tshia kulumbuluisha katshiena tshishilangane to.
paragraphs.3: Kukadi bidimu makumi asatu, RDC mmukengeshibue kudi Rwanda ne bisumbu bikuabu bia basalayi bibi, bifikisha ku lufu lua bantu miliyo ya bungi, makumi a binunu bia bantu badi bumbuka mu nzubu yabu, ne nsombelu mubi wa diambuluisha dia bantu.

paragraphs.1: Ku bulombodi bwa mfumu wa ditunga wa kumpala, tshipangu tshia ditunga tshidi tshituadije dishintulula dia malu a kulumbuluisha dia malu adi ne tshipatshila tshia kulengeja bulongolodi bua malu a kulumbuluisha.
paragraphs.2: Mashintuluka aa adi atangila dienza dia mikanda ya ku tubadi ku Enternete, dienza dia mishindu ya dilombola dia bilumbu, ne programe ya dilongesha dia balumbuluishi ne bena mudimu ba ku tubadi.
paragraphs.3: Malu aa adi aleja mudi Kabadi kadifila bua kuenza malu patoke, kuenza mudimu bimpe ne kuikala ne diandamuna mu dilombola dia malu a bululame.

paragraphs.1: STATE COUNCIL udi wenza mudimu ne bibambalu bia kulumbuluisha bia pa buloba bujima ne udi ubuela mu bisangilu bia pa buloba bujima bua kuabanyangana malu adibu bapeta.
paragraphs.2: Kupityila ku buobumue ne tubadi tua mu France, Belgique, ne matunga makuabu adi akula tshiena-France, tubadi tudi tujadika ne tudi anu ku mutu kua malu a mikenji.
paragraphs.3: Diumvuangana edi dia matunga a buloba bujima didi dikolesha ndongoluelu wa malu a kulumbuluisha wa ditunga dia RDC ne dikolesha bukole buadi bua kufila bululame bilondeshela mikenji ya matunga a buloba bujima.

2.title: Malu manene a kuela meji mu bilumbu bia tshipangu tshia ditunga

3.title: Mashintuluka a matuku mashale aa mu mikenji ya malu a dilumbuluisha

hero.title: KUMVUA BUKOKESHI BUA BUALU BUA BULOMBODI BUA BULOMBODI MU DITUKU DIA DEMOCRATIQUE DU CONGO

intro.title: KUMVUA BUKOKESHI BUA BUALU BUA BULOMBODI BUA BULOMBODI MU DITUKU DIA DEMOCRATIQUE DU CONGO
intro.body: Kanungu ka 151 kanungu ka 1 ka Dîyi dikulu dia ditunga dia RDC dia dia matuku 18 ngondo muibidi 2006, kadi kateka ndongoluelu wa dilumbuluisha dia mbulamatadi udi ne tubadi tua mbulamatadi ne tubadi tudi tulombola kudi Tshipangu tshia Ditunga. Kanungu ka 82 ka Dîyi dikulu Nomba 13/011-B dia dia matuku 11 ngondo muinayi 2013 didi dijadika bulongolodi, dienza ne mudimu wa tubadi tua mbulamatadi didi dileja ne kudi dikalaku dia tshipangu tshia ditunga tshidi ne tshibambalu tshiatshi tshia pa tshibidilu tshidi mu tshimenga tshikulu tshia ditunga dia Congo. Bukokeshi bwandi bwa bukokeshi budi mua kuenzeka muaba mukuabu. Mu malu a kale, Tshipangu tshia ditunga mu muyuki muipi eu, tshidi tshilonda malu a kale ne miji yatshi mu tshibambalu tshietu tshia kulumbuluisha. Tshipangu tshia mbulamatadi tshiakafukibua ku diambuluisha dia mukenji mu dia matuku 31 ngondo wa kumpala tshidimu tshia 1968, tshidi tshipeta tshimanyinu tshiatshi tshia pa buatshi bidimu bipite pa lukama. Bushuwa, bidimu muanda mukulu kunyima kua dipeta dia budikadidi mu 1960 ke muvua ditunga dijadike Tshipangu tshia Ditunga etshi bua kulombola bilumbu bia mbulamatadi. Anu kunyima kua bidimu lukama mu 2015 ke muvua Kabadi kanene ka malu a mbulamatadi. Kabadi aka kakalekela kuikalaku kunyima kua Dîyi dikulu dia ditunga dia 2006 ne dijadikibua diadi, divua diamba ne: mikenji yonso ivua mibengangane ne ivua kayiyi ne mushinga ne ivua ileja mu kanungu ka 223 ne: mapangadika ne mêyi avuabu bafile kumpala kua dimanyisha dia Dîyi dikulu dia ditunga adi ne bukole adi mapita ne tubadi tua mu malu adibu bapatule mu mushindu mutambe buimpe, badi bateka mu bilumbu bia pa buabi ne bia pa buabi mu dilonga dia pa buadi dia ngondo muibidi 18, 2006, Kabadi kanene ka malu a mbulamatadi kakalekela kuikalaku mu dia matuku 11 ngondo muinayi 2013 pavua mikenji ya bulongolodi No. 13/011-B ya dia matuku 11 ngondo muinayi 2013 iteka bulongolodi, dienza ne mudimu wa tubadi tua mbulamatadi. Bilondeshile kanungu ka 151 kanungu ka 3 ka Dîyi dikulu didi diteka bukookeshi bwa kulongolola bwa dienza dia bukookeshi bwa Kabadi kakulu ka kale. Matunga a buludiki ne tubadi tudi tuenza bulongolodi bwa dilumbuluisha dia buludiki mu Congo.

rubrics.procedureBeforeCouncil: Mushindu wa kuenza kumpala kua tshipangu tshia ditunga

legal.title:
KUBUELA MU MIKANDA MINENE NE MIKANDA YA
YA TSHIBAMBALU tshia DITUKU

docs.1: Mikenji ya bulongolodi N° 13/011-B ya dia matuku 11 ngondo muinayi 2013 idi itangila bulongolodi, dienza ne mudimu wa makokeshi a bantu bonso
docs.2: Mukenji N° 13/046 wa dia matuku 25 ngondo wa tshitema 2013 udi utangila nzubu ya tshipangu tshia ditunga
docs.3: Mukenji wa mikenji N° 13/018 udi utangila difutu ne makuta adibu bafila kudi balumbuluishi

detail.title: Mikenji ya bulongolodi N° 13/011-B ya dia matuku 11 ngondo muinayi 2013 idi itangila bulongolodi, dienza ne mudimu wa makokeshi a mbulamatadi
detail.paragraph1: Malu adi mu meyi aa N° 13/011-B a dia matuku 11 ngondo muinayi 2013 adi atangila bulongolodi, dienza ne mudimu wa makokeshi a mbulamatadi adi mateka mu tshilumbu tshia mbulamatadi tshia kulumbuluisha.
detail.paragraph2: Tshitupa tshionso tshia mikenji tshidi tshifunda mu meyi manene a mu tshitupa tshia kumpala tshia banzuji:

list1.2: CITUPA II: Disungula ne diteka dia ba majistre ne ba bafundi
list1.3: CITUPA III: tshia mbulamatadi wa mikenji
list1.4: CITUPA IV: Bukokeshi, bijadiki ne mikalu ya ba Magistrate

detail.paragraph3: Bidi bilondeshila tshitupa tshia II tshia tshipangu tshia ditunga kanungu ka 81 too ne kanungu ka 95 ne kanungu konso kadi kakula patoke bua tshipangu tshia ditunga mu nshapita idi ilonda eyi:

list2.2: CITUPA II: Diteka, dienza dia Tshipangu tshia Ditunga
list2.3: CITUPA III: Bisumbu bishilangane, mudimu ne bena mudimu ba Tshipangu tshia Ditunga

detail.paragraph4: Bulongolodi budi mu kanungu ka 82 budi buleja mushindu udi Tshipangu tshia Ditunga tshienza, ne budi buleja bena mudimu badi bambuluisha ba-majistre ne bena mudimu bambuluishi badibu bafila bua kukumbaja mudimu wa mbulamatadi.
detail.paragraph5: Kanungu ka 83 kadi kaleja difila dia tshipangu tshia ditunga, tshimue tshia kudibi ntshia se: Dilomba dia dilumbuluisha mu malu a mbulamatadi; Udi wenza mudimu ne dinyoka dia balumbuluishi ne bambuluishi ba ku tubadi mu bukokeshi buende; Udi upeta mutshipu wa ba majistre ne bena mudimu ba ku kabadi badi muinshi mua bukookeshi bwa mbulamatadi; Udi ufila lungenyi lua mikenji kumpala kua balumbuluishi badibu basungula anyi kudi mbulamatadi wa bukokeshi. Kanungu ka 84 kadi kaleja dienza dia bitupa bishilangane ne dienza dia tshipangu tshia ditunga; Kanungu ka 88 kadi kaleja difila dia bintu mu diyukidilangana dia tshibambalu, tshibambalu tshionso tshidi ne tshia kuikala tshibambalu tshia bukokeshi bua kukumbaja mudimu wa tshipangu tshia ditunga tshia kusomba bua difila dia bintu bishilangane anu pikala bungi bua bantu bufika.
detail.paragraph6: Bungi bua bantu budibu balomba mu kanungu budi bufika, padi nzubu yonso milongolola mushindu ewu: mulombodi anyi mulombodi muibidi wa nzubu ne banzuji bakuabu babidi, ne kabidi mufidi wa mibelu wa malu a mikenji ne mufundi wa mikanda.
detail.paragraph7: Pa bidi bitangila tshisumbu tshia balumbuluishi tshidi mu kanungu ka 89, tshibambalu tshionso tshidi mua kuikala tshibambalu tshia bukookeshi bwa kukumbaja mudimu wa tshipangu tshia ditunga ne kusomba bua mishindu mishilangane anu pikala tshisumbu tshikumbane.
detail.paragraph8: Bungi bua bantu budibu balomba mu kanungu budi bufika, padi nzubu yonso milongolola mushindu ewu: mulombodi anyi mulombodi muibidi wa nzubu ne banzuji bakuabu babidi, ne kabidi mufidi wa mibelu wa malu a mikenji ne mufundi wa mikanda. Ne dikumbaja dia muntu udi ne bualu udi musombe mu tshikondo tshia mudimu ne diambuluisha diende pikalabi bikengela ne mu tshikondo tshia diyukidilangana ku tshiibi tshikanga, ne dibuela dia Procureur général mu diyukidilangana ne dibuela dia mufundi didi dienzeka ku diambuluisha dia dilongesha dia bualu.
detail.paragraph9: Panyima pa wewe mumane kubala ne kumvuija mikanda ya mikenji kudi matunga adi mu tshisanji etshi, udi mua kulomba mudimu wabu buludiludi pa kutubikila ku e-mail anyi ku telefone ne nunku wewe kuyipeta.

hero.title:
BIDI BILOMBA
BIDI BISHINTULULA
hero.body: Kulengeja ndongoluelu wa malu a kulumbuluisha kupitshila ku dishintulula dia malu adi akolesha dienza dia mudimu bimpe, dikala patoke ne dipeta dia bululame kudi bena ditunga dijima dia Congo.

building.title: KUENZA BUALU BUA BUALU BUA BUALU BUA BUKOLE
building.body: Bilondeshela Dîyi dikulu dia 2006, Tshipangu tshia ditunga tshiakatuadija malu a bungi bua kukolesha budikadidi bua balumbuluishi, kulengeja mushindu wa kupeta bululame ne kuenza malu bilondeshile mikenji ya matunga a bungi. Mianda eyi idi itangila dikolesha dia bibambalu, dishintulula dia malu a ordinatere ne dikolesha dia bukole.

initiatives.title: BIDIMU BIA DISHINTULULA DIA MUSHINDU
initiatives.body: Mushindu mujalame wa bitupa bitanu wa kulengeja bulongolodi buetu bua kulumbuluisha, bua kujadika dienza dia malu mimpe ku tshitupa tshionso tshia dishintuluka.

1.title: Budikadidi bwa bulongolodi
1.body: Kukolesha budikadidi bua balumbuluishi ku diambuluisha dia mikenji ya ditunga ne budikadidi bua malu a mfranga.

2.title: Dipeta dia bululame
2.body: Kuvudija midimu ya diambuluisha dia mikenji ne kuenza miaba ya kufika mu bitupa bia ditunga mu ditunga dijima.

3.title: Buobumue bua matunga masanga
3.body: Kukolesha malanda ne bibambalu bia kulumbuluisha bia matunga masanga bua dishintakaja dia mamanya.

4.title: Dishintuluka dia malu a ordinatere
4.body: Kuenza mudimu ne ndongamu ya lelu ya dilombola dia bilumbu ne mikanda ya mikenji ya pa buloba.

5.title: Dikolesha dia bukole
5.body: Dilongesha dia tshiendelele dia ba-majistre ne mamanya a makebulula a mikenji.

hero.title:
INTERNATIONAL
RELATIONS
hero.body: Mu tshikondu tshia divuija dia meyi ne bululame pa buloba bujima, Tshisangilu tshia ditunga tshia ditunga dia Congo katshiena tshitapuluke ne nsombelu ewu to. Udi ubuela mu diyukidilangana dia balumbuluishi pa kulama buobumue bua bungi mu tshisumbu tshia tubadi tunene tua matunga adi bakula muakulu wa Mfualansa (AHJUCAF) ne tshisumbu tshia tubadi tunene tua mu Afrike (AA-HJF).

stats.associations: Bisumbu binene bia balumbuluishi bia pa buloba bujima
stats.partners: Matunga adi mu buobumue ne tubadi tunene
stats.exchanges: Dishintakaja dia malu a kulumbuluisha ne mpungilu ya tshidimu tshionso

networks.title: BIDIMU BIA BULOBA BUA BULOBA BUJIMA
networks.subtitle: Kabadi kadi kalama malanda mimpe ne malongolodi manene a tubadi tunene tua bena Francophone ne tua mu Afrike

ahjucaf.name: Tshisumbu tshia tubadi tunene tshienza mudimu ne Mfualansa
ahjucaf.body: Tshibambalu tshia dishintakaja ne dienza mudimu pamue pankatshi pa tubadi tunene tua bena Francophone, diambuluisha dia diyukidilangana dia balumbuluishi, diabanya dia malu a mikenji, ne dikolesha dia bukole bua bibambalu mu matunga adibu bakula tshiena-France pa buloba bujima.

aahjf.name: Tshisumbu tshia bena Afrike tshia tubadi tunene tua bena Francophone
aahjf.body: Tshibambalu tshia dishintakaja ne dienza mudimu pamue pankatshi pa tubadi tunene tua bena Francophone, diambuluisha dia diyukidilangana dia balumbuluishi, diabanya dia malu a mikenji, ne dikolesha dia bukole bua bibambalu mu matunga adibu bakula tshiena-France pa buloba bujima.

domains.title: BIDIMU BIA BUALU BUA BUALU BUA BULOBA BUA BUALU
domains.subtitle: Diumvuangana dietu dia matunga a bungi didi difila dibuela mu malu mashilangane adi ne tshipatshila tshia kukolesha bulenga bua bululame ne dikokesha dia mikenji

dialogue.title: Diyukidilangana dia balumbuluishi
dialogue.body: Diyukidilangana dia pa tshibidilu pa malu a mikenji, mishindu mimpe ya kuenza mudimu, ne ntatu idi tubadi tunene tupeta, dikolesha dilonga dia muntu ne muntu ne diumvuija dia mikenji didi dipetangana.

assistance.title: Diambuluisha dia malu a tekiniki
assistance.body: Technical cooperation for modernization of judicial systems, digitalization, and improvement of access to justice through shared experiences.

capacity.title: Dikolesha dia bukole
capacity.body: Programe ya dilongesha, bisangilu, ne bisangilu bia mudimu bua kukolesha mamanya a ba-majistre ne bena mudimu ba ku tubadi ku diambuluisha dia mamanya a pa buloba bujima.

forums.title: Nsangilu ya matunga masanga
forums.body: Kubuela mu bisangilu bia matunga masanga bua kuambuluisha mu dikola dia mikenji ya matunga masanga ne ya bitupa bia ditunga ne mikenji ya kulumbuluisha.

collaboration.title: Udi musue kuenza mudimu pamue anyi?
collaboration.body: Tudi badisuike bua kuenza mudimu pamue ne kuyukila ne matunga makuabu a mu ditunga ne a pa buloba bujima adi adifila bua kukolesha bulongolodi bua malu a kulumbuluisha.

hero.title: BIUMVUILU NE BIDIMU BIA MU ROLL
hero.body: Tangila ndongamu ya kuteleja, bitupa bia mukanda, ne mapangadika a matuku mashale aa.

understanding.title: KUMVUA BANTU BATELEJI
understanding.body: Keba buludiki bua mushindu udi bateleji balongolola ne mushindu wa kutangila mikanda ya lelu.

metrics.title: BIDIMU BIDI BUMVUA
metrics.subtitle: Bungi bua diumvua dia ku ngondo ne bipeta mu bule bua matuku.

volume.title: Bungi bua diumvua dia ngondo yonso
volume.aria: Bungi bua diumvua dia ngondo yonso

outcomes.title: Bipeta mu bule bua matuku
outcomes.aria: Bipeta bia kumvua mu bule bua matuku

civil.label: Civile
civil.title: Bitupa bia dilumbuluisha dia nzubu wa tshididi

criminal.label: Muena tshibawu
criminal.title: Bitupa bia dilumbuluisha dia nzubu wa tshibawu

social.label: Nsombelu
social.title: Bitupa bia dilumbuluisha dia nzubu wa tshilala benyi

general.label: Mu kabujima
general.title: Bitupa bia tshilumbu tshia mu nzubu wa tshipangu tshinene

assistance.title: Udi dijinga ne diambuluisha anyi?
assistance.body: Udi mua kubikila bena mu tshipangu tshia ditunga bua kukuambuluisha bua kupeta mikanda anyi ndongamu.

firstPresident.title: MULOMBODI WA KUMPALA
firstPresident.body: Mfumu wa ditunga wa kumpala udi ulombola tshipangu tshia ditunga, ulombola bisangilu biatshi, ne udi utangila mudimu muimpe wa tshibambalu etshi.

hero.title: Bulongolodi bwa Conseil d'Etat
hero.subtitle: Organigramme
hero.body: Maloba a ntete a bulongolodi bwa Conseil d'Etat.

tiles.registry: Muaba wa difunda dia mena ne Sekretariya Munene

cards.presidentsTitle: Balombodi ba kumpala ba Conseil d'Etat

cards.procedures: Mushindu wa kuenza kumpala kua tshipangu tshia ditunga

firstPresidents.title: BALOMBODI BA KUMPALA
firstPresidents.honoraryTitle: Mulombodi wa kumpala wa buneme ne wa tshijila: 2018 - 2022
firstPresidents.honoraryTitleSecond: Mulombodi wa buneme ne wa mudimu: 2022 - 2025

chart.title: TABULU WA BULONGOLODI
chart.subtitle: Tshikoso tshia bulongolodi bua bulombodi ne bitupa bia nshindamenu bia tshipangu tshia ditunga.
chart.interactiveSubtitle: Tangila bulongolodi ne mushindu wa kufila luapolo.
chart.aria: Tablo wa bulongolodi udi utangila malu
chart.peopleSubtitle: Mêna a Mulombodi wa kumpala, balombodi ne bafidi ba mibelu.

namedPhotoRoles.contentieux: Mulombodi wa tshitupa tshia malu a bilumbu

nodes.registry: Muaba wa difunda dia mêna ne bintu bia kale

filters.searchPlaceholder: Keba ku dina anyi ku mudimu
filters.summary: Kuleja balombodi ba {{presidents}} ne bafidi ba mibelu ba {{advisors}}

presidents.title: BA PRESIDENT
presidents.empty: Kakuena mfumu wa ditunga udi upetangana ne tshiudi ukeba to.

advisors.title: BANTU BA MIBELU
advisors.empty: Kakuena mufidi wa mibelu udi ukumbanangana ne tshiudi ukeba to.

registry.title: Mukanda wa difunda
registry.body: Tangila mikanda, nsombelu wa tshilumbu, ne mikanda ya mbulamatadi.

docs.title: Mikanda
docs.body: Keba formilere, mikanda ya mikenji, ne mishindu ya kuenza mudimu.

tv.title: TV wa tshipangu
tv.body: Tangila bilumbu, mamanyisha, ne malu mapiamapia.

services.title: MIDIMU YETU
services.subtitle: Tangila bitupa ne bibambalu bidi bikuatshisha mudimu wa Tshipangu tshia Ditunga.

rooms.title: Nzubu
rooms.body: Bibambalu bia mbulamatadi ne bia kulumbuluisha bidi bilongolola dikokangana ne diteleja dia malu.

council.title: Mibelu
council.body: Biro bidi bilombola mikenji ne bulombodi bua bibambalu.

registers.title: Ma registre
registers.body: Bibambalu bidi bitangila mikanda, bintu bia kale, ne mikanda ya mbulamatadi.

chambers.title: Nzubu
chambers.body1: Tshibambalu tshionso tshidi tshitangila malu a pa buawu adi mu bukokeshi buatshi.
chambers.body2: Bibambalu bidi mu mishindu bilondeshile mikenji idiku.

rooms.title: Nzubu ne nzubu ya tshilala benyi
rooms.body1: Bibambalu bidi bilongolola bilumbu ne bilongolola mikanda ya bilumbu.
rooms.body2: Badi bajadika dilonda dia mikenji ne dilongolola dia ndongamu.
rooms.body3: Badi bakuatshisha diyukidilangana ne dilongolola dia malu a mbulamatadi.
rooms.body4: Badi bajadika dienda dia bilumbu bimpa too ne ku mapangadika a ndekelu.

council.title: Biro bia tshipangu
council.body1: Biro bia tshipangu bidi bienza mudimu wa dilongolola dia malu.
council.body2: Udi ulongolola bisangilu bia tshisangilu ne mishindu ya mikenji.
council.body3: Udi utangila dikumbaja dia mapangadika ne dishintulula.
council.body4: Udi ukuatshisha dimanyishangana ne malanda a bibambalu.

registers.title: Bikandakanda ne bintu bia kale
registers.body1: Ma registre adi apeta ne afunda mikanda ne mapangadika.
registers.body2: Badi balama bintu bia kale bua kubilama mutantshi mule.
registers.body3: Badi bafila mikanda mijadika padibu babalomba.
registers.body4: Badi balombola difunda ne dipeta dia mikanda ya bilumbu.
registers.body5: Badi bajadika tshisokomenu ne bulelela bua mikanda.
